title: primula officinalis subsp. canescens
intro: Primula officinalis subsp. canescens, also known as the Manchurian primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the primrose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Primula officinalis subsp. canescens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting digestive health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or by using the dried leaves in tinctures or capsules.
